title: milestone acceptance verdict
description: The publisher-style milestone review loop: an independent reviewer judges the milestone build against its defined deliverables, returning accepted or a reasonably-detailed deficiency list. The wave allows exactly one repair round before failing (mirrors capped resubmissions in real milestone contracts).

deficiencies.description: on rejection: each deficiency specific enough to action — what, where, and what 'fixed' looks like

resubmission.description: which submission round this verdict is for (0 = first)
